title: Thol Heat Wave
lead: Thol is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +5.49. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Thol is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 18.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 36%, and the wind speed is moderate at 13.2 km/h. 
 The absence of any Heating Degree Days (HDD) indicates that the temperatures are consistently high, with no relief in sight.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
